'''Sam Weller''', along with Judge [[Bellican]] and attorney [[Oryon|Tomay Alcorn]], was sent to the [[Penumbra Spaceport]] so that they could trial [[Dona Telamark]] and [[Roan Lands]] on the ''[[True Justice]]''. This was prevented, however, when [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace]], Oryon, and [[Trever Flume]] impersonated the three to free Dona and Roan.<ref name="ATW" />
